prompt: Create a polished vertical anime-style cyberpunk character illustration of a confident young woman standing in the middle of a rainy neon city alley at night. She has long vivid purple hair styled in a high messy bun with side-swept bangs and one very long thick braid falling over her shoulder down past her hips, with glossy highlights and a few smaller braided sections near the scalp. Her face is deliberately covered by a centered opaque rectangular censor block in muted dusty pink, hiding all facial features. She wears a cropped white tank top, a bright yellow bomber jacket with black ribbed cuffs, black spiked shoulder studs, zipper details, and embroidered blue-and-red dragon designs; count exactly 5 visible dragon embroidery motifs: 2 on the viewer-left sleeve/body area, 2 on the viewer-right sleeve/body area, and 1 near the right chest. She also wears shiny black high-waisted latex shorts, a hot pink belt with a silver buckle, and a small turquoise side accent. Pose her with a strong hourglass stance, one hand resting at her hip and the other arm bent back, torso facing forward. The background is a narrow futuristic street with wet reflective pavement, mist, dark building silhouettes, and glowing signage; include exactly 4 prominent neon signs: a pink sign on the left foreground with Korean-like characters and small English-style text, a small cyan vertical sign in the mid-left distance, a tall purple vertical sign high on the right with Korean-like characters, and a cyan sign on the right foreground. Use dramatic magenta and cyan rim lighting, rain-slick reflections, shallow depth of field, high-detail glossy rendering, clean linework, vibrant colors, and a cinematic 2:3 composition. Avoid extra characters, avoid readable brand logos, and keep the style as a high-end anime illustration with cyberpunk polish.
